news_metadata.title: 测试：华东港口拥堵导致啤酒原料与成品配送延迟
news_metadata.content: 受短时强降雨和码头作业效率下降影响，华东某港口出现阶段性拥堵，多个集装箱班次延后24至36小时。进口啤酒花、麦芽以及铝制易拉罐包装的到港节奏受到影响，部分精酿啤酒厂反馈灌装计划可能顺延。多家物流企业已启动分流方案，改走周边港口与公路联运，以降低啤酒供应链中断风险。

level1.matched_name: 9. 咖啡、茶、马黛茶及调味香料
level1.reason: 啤酒花（hops）是啤酒酿造中常用的调味香料，具有苦味和香气，国际HS编码中归入调味香料类别（HS 0912）

hs_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: HS Level1匹配置信度0.95，低于阈值

segment.reason: 啤酒花 (hops) is a key ingredient in beer production, falling under food and beverage raw materials

family.reason: Hops (啤酒花) are primarily used as a flavoring and stability agent in brewing, but fresh hops are classified as a culinary garnish or herb in food categorization systems.

class.reason: 啤酒花 (hops) is used as a flavoring and garnish in food and beverage production, particularly in brewing, and fits under fresh garnish category for culinary use.

brick.reason: Beer hops (Humulus lupulus) is a brewing ingredient, not a food garnish leaf or flower; none of the candidates match.

gpc_hierarchical_result.fail_reason: GPC Brick匹配置信度0.00，低于阈值

level1.matched_name: 制粉工业产品;麦芽;淀粉;菊粉;面筋
level1.reason: Product name '麦芽' directly matches the term '麦芽' in candidate 11.

level2.reason: Product name '麦芽' directly matches candidate 7.

level3.reason: 麦芽通常指未经焙制的发芽大麦，用于酿造和食品加工；若未特别说明‘焙制’，默认为未焙制状态

segment.reason: 麦芽 (malt) is a food ingredient commonly used in brewing, baking, and food production.

family.reason: Malt (麦芽) is produced by germinating cereal grains, typically barley, and falls under cereal/grain-based food products.

class.reason: Malt (麦芽) is a germinated cereal grain, commonly barley, used in brewing and food production; it falls under the broader category of grains, aligning with 'Grains/Flour' rather than processed or packaged varieties.

brick.matched_name: Grains/Cereal - Not Ready to Eat - (Shelf Stable)
brick.reason: Malt (麦芽) is a germinated cereal grain, typically barley, used as an ingredient in brewing and food production; it is not ready to eat, shelf-stable, and falls under grains/cereal not ready to eat category.

normalized_fields.gpc_name: Grains/Cereal - Not Ready to Eat - (Shelf Stable)
